channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [AIIL] Mentor Capital Acquires Shares of Authum Investment & Infrastructure Ltd. Worth INR 84,92,25,500
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Mentor Capital Limited, a company listed on BSE Limited & The National Stock Exchange of India Limited, has acquired shares of Authum Investment & Infrastructure Limited. The acquisition was made through open market on 9th March, 2026. The total consideration for the acquisition is INR 84,92,25,500, which is divided into 84,92,25,500 shares of Re. 1 each. Mrs. Alpana Dangi, a Person Acting in Concert (PAC) with Mentor Capital Limited, also acquired shares in the same transaction. The total voting rights of Mentor Capital Limited and Mrs. Alpana Dangi after the acquisition stands at 68.79%.

  • Mentor Capital Limited acquires shares of Authum Investment & Infrastructure Limited worth INR 84,92,25,500
  • The acquisition was made through open market on 9th March, 2026
  • Mentor Capital Limited and Mrs. Alpana Dangi hold 68.79% voting rights post acquisition
  • The acquisition includes 84,92,25,500 shares of Re. 1 each
  • Mrs. Alpana Dangi, a Person Acting in Concert (PAC) with Mentor Capital Limited, also acquired shares in the same transaction

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Authum Investment & Infrastructure Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [TI] TIMF Holdings FDI AC Acquires 2.43% Stake in Tilaknagar Industries Ltd Through Warrants Conversion
item.description:
TIMF Holdings FDI AC, along with Think India Opportunities Master Fund LP and Think Investments PCC, have acquired a 2.43% stake in Tilaknagar Industries Ltd through the conversion of warrants into equity shares. The warrants, which were set to expire on 28th March 2027, were converted at a 1:1 ratio. The acquisition took place on 12th February 2026. Previously, TIMF Holdings FDI AC, along with its Persons Acting in Concert (PAC), held 4.41% shares in Tilaknagar Industries Ltd. Post-acquisition, their holding has increased to 6.84%.

  • TIMF Holdings FDI AC, along with Think India Opportunities Master Fund LP and Think Investments PCC, have acquired a 2.43% stake in Tilaknagar Industries Ltd.
  • The acquisition was made through the conversion of warrants into equity shares.
  • The warrants, which were set to expire on 28th March 2027, were converted at a 1:1 ratio.
  • Previously, TIMF Holdings FDI AC, along with its PAC, held 4.41% shares in Tilaknagar Industries Ltd.
  • Post-acquisition, their holding has increased to 6.84%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TILAKNAGAR INDUSTRIES LTD.-$ | Category: Investment

item.title: [ARISINFRA] Think Investments PCC FDI Acquires 3.48% Stake in ArisInfra Solutions Ltd
item.description:
Think Investments PCC FDI, through its various funds, has acquired a 3.48% stake in ArisInfra Solutions Ltd. The acquisition was made through the secondary market on 26th February 2026. The paid-up equity capital of ArisInfra Solutions Ltd is 81761246 shares, making Think Investments PCC FDI's holding 2845701 shares. This is an increase from the last reported holding of 5.93%.

  • Think Investments PCC FDI has acquired a 3.48% stake in ArisInfra Solutions Ltd
  • The acquisition was made through the secondary market on 26th February 2026
  • The paid-up equity capital of ArisInfra Solutions Ltd is 81761246 shares
  • Think Investments PCC FDI's holding is now 2845701 shares
  • This is an increase from the last reported holding of 5.93%

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ARISINFRA | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [INDOUS] Indo Us Bio-Tech Ltd Clarifies Significant Price Movement Unrelated to Company Information
item.description:
Indo Us Bio-Tech Ltd has clarified a significant movement in its security price, stating that they are not aware of any information or announcement that could have a bearing on the price or volume behavior. The company has been making prompt disclosures as required under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and has not withheld any material information. The price movement is considered market-driven and due to investor sentiment.

  • Indo Us Bio-Tech Ltd clarifies price movement unrelated to company information
  • Company has been making prompt disclosures as required by SEBI regulations
  • No material information withheld by the company
  • Price movement considered market-driven and due to investor sentiment
  • Company ensures disclosures available on its website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indo Us Bio-Tech Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [JUPITERIN] Manisha Umesh Modi Acquires 32.16% Stake in Jupiter Infomedia Ltd
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Manisha Umesh Modi, a promoter of Jupiter Infomedia Ltd, has acquired a significant stake in the company. The acquisition was made through a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) dated April 09, 2025. The total consideration for the acquisition is Rs. 10,02,00,000. Post-acquisition, Modi holds 32.16% of the total share capital and voting rights of the company.

  • Manisha Umesh Modi, a promoter of Jupiter Infomedia Ltd, has acquired a significant stake in the company.
  • The acquisition was made through a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) dated April 09, 2025.
  • The total consideration for the acquisition is Rs. 10,02,00,000.
  • Post-acquisition, Modi holds 32.16% of the total share capital and voting rights of the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JUPITER INFOMEDIA LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [VISCO] Rashi Goenka Acquires 2.47% Stake in Gamco Ltd Through Open Market Transactions
item.description:
Rashi Goenka, a promoter of Gamco Ltd, has acquired 63000 Equity Shares of the company, which amounts to 2.47% of the issued and paid-up equity share capital. The acquisition took place from 09.03.2026 to 10.03.2026 through open market transactions.

  • Rashi Goenka, a promoter of Gamco Ltd, acquires 63000 Equity Shares
  • The acquisition amounts to 2.47% of the issued and paid-up equity share capital
  • The transaction took place from 09.03.2026 to 10.03.2026
  • The acquisition was made through open market transactions
  • Gamco Ltd's equity share capital post-acquisition remains at Rs. 10,80,63,000.00/ - consisting of 5,40,31,500 Equity shares of Rs. 2/- each

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Visco Trade Associates Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [VERANDA] Veranda's Commerce Vertical Produces 190 All-India Rankers in CA January 2026 Exams
item.description:
Veranda Learning Solutions' Commerce Vertical has delivered an outstanding performance in the Chartered Accountancy January 2026 examinations, producing 190 All-India Rank holders across CA Final, CA Intermediate, and CA Foundation. BB Virtuals students secured the top-3 ranks in the CA Final examination for the fourth consecutive time.

  • Veranda's Commerce Vertical produced 190 All-India Rank holders in CA January 2026 exams
  • BB Virtuals students secured the top-3 ranks in CA Final examination for the fourth consecutive time
  • Highly competitive nature of the CA examinations
  • Veranda's focus on high-quality teaching, personalized mentorship, and outcome-driven learning
  • Strong performance across all levels of the CA examination

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Veranda Learning Solutions Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ARVSMART] HDFC Capital Affordable Real Estate Fund-1 Sells Shares in Arvind SmartSpaces Ltd, Reducing Stake to 0.97%
item.description:
HDFC Capital Affordable Real Estate Fund-1 (HCARE-1), a Category II alternative investment fund registered with SEBI, has sold shares in Arvind SmartSpaces Ltd. The sale, which took place on the open market, reduced HCARE-1's stake from 3.78% to 0.97%. The transaction involved 4,58,670 shares, with a total transaction value of Rs. 45,86,69,790/-. The shares were sold on February 24, 2026, and the allotment was intimated on March 9, 2026. The paid-up capital of Arvind SmartSpaces Ltd is Rs. 45,86,69,790/- (4,58,66,979 equity shares of Face Value of Rs. 10 each).

  • HDFC Capital Affordable Real Estate Fund-1 sells shares in Arvind SmartSpaces Ltd
  • Sale reduces HCARE-1's stake from 3.78% to 0.97%
  • Transaction involves 4,58,670 shares
  • Total transaction value of Rs. 45,86,69,790/-
  • Shares sold on February 24, 2026, and allotment intimated on March 9, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Arvind SmartSpaces Ltd | Category: Sale

item.title: [DEVIT] XDuce Technologies Acquires Shares of Dev Information Technology Ltd: SEBI Disclosure
item.description:
XDuce Technologies Private Limited has disclosed the acquisition of shares of Dev Information Technology Limited under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The acquisition took place on 6th March 2026 and 9th March 2026. The total number of shares held by XDuce Technologies Private Limited before the acquisition was 13,156,399, which is 23.35% of the total shares of Dev Information Technology Limited. After the acquisition, the number of shares held by XDuce Technologies Private Limited increased to 13,217,205, which is 23.46% of the total shares of Dev Information Technology Limited.

  • XDuce Technologies Private Limited has acquired shares of Dev Information Technology Limited.
  • The acquisition took place on 6th March 2026 and 9th March 2026.
  • Before the acquisition, XDuce Technologies Private Limited held 13,156,399 shares of Dev Information Technology Limited.
  • After the acquisition, XDuce Technologies Private Limited holds 13,217,205 shares of Dev Information Technology Limited.
  • The total number of shares of Dev Information Technology Limited is 11,26,70,464.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dev Information Technology Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [GOKUL] Arjunsinh Rajput Acquires 1.41% Stake in Gokul Refoils & Solvent Ltd via Open Market
item.description:
According to a disclosure made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, Arjunsinh Rajput has acquired a 1.41% stake in Gokul Refoils & Solvent Ltd on March 09, 2026. The acquisition was made through the open market. The total equity share capital of the company is Rs.19,79,90,000 divided into 9,89,95,000 equity shares of Rs. 2/- each, both before and after the transaction. The total diluted share/voting capital of the company is also unchanged at Rs.19,79,90,000 divided into 9,89,95,000 equity shares of Rs. 2/- each after the transaction.

  • Arjunsinh Rajput acquires 1.41% stake in Gokul Refoils & Solvent Ltd
  • Acquisition made through the open market
  • Total equity share capital and diluted share/voting capital remain unchanged
  • Transaction valued at Rs.19,79,90,000
  • Acquisition made on March 09, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GOKUL REFOILS & SOLVENT LTD. | Category: Acquisitions
